title: fix: respect "--extract" flag for podman cp

comments.body: I would expect that `podman cp --extract a.tar "625099cc3ea5:/"` would extract the tar to root, but instead it just copies the tar to root.

Could you add a test for this
/approve
LGTM other then tests.
Could you squash your two PRs together, and sign them.
